title: dodecatheon conjugens var. viscidum
intro: Dodecatheon conjugens var. viscidum, also known as sticky Western Pasque flower, is a type of flowering plant in the gentian family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Dodecatheon conjugens var. viscidum are said to include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
